parameters.command: ={{ $json.body.sessionId ? "unset CLAUDECODE && /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r " + $json.body.sessionId + " --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions \"Summarize what you worked on in this session in 2-3 sentences. Then on a new line starting with LESSON: write a single sentence describing what you learned that would help with similar issues in the future (a novel failure mode, an unexpected root cause, a tool that worked well, or a gotcha to avoid). If nothing novel was learned, write LESSON: none.\" 2>&1" : "echo '{\"result\": \"No summary available (no session ID)\"}'}" }}

=DB="/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db"
GW="/app/cubeos/claude-context"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $("Parse Summary").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
case "$PREFIX" in
  IFRNLLEI01PRD) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.infra-nl" ;;
  IFRGRSKG01PRD) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.infra-gr" ;;
  CUBEOS) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.cubeos" ;;
  MESHSAT) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.meshsat" ;;
  *) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.dev" ;;
esac
# Ensure columns exist in both tables
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN num_turns INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN duration_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN confidence REAL DEFAULT -1;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN resolution_type TEXT DEFAULT 'unknown';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN alert_category TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN prompt_variant TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN model TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN model TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN num_turns INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN duration_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN confidence REAL DEFAULT -1;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN prompt_variant TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN alert_category TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
# Determine alert_category from issue title (fallback if Runner didn't set it)
ISSUE_TITLE_LOWER=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT LOWER(issue_title) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
ALERT_CAT=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT alert_category FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID' AND alert_category != '';" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
if [ -z "$ALERT_CAT" ]; then
  ALERT_CAT="general"
  case "$ISSUE_TITLE_LOWER" in
    *up/down*|*unreachable*|*ping*|*down*) ALERT_CAT="availability" ;;
    *cpu*|*load*|*memory*|*oom*) ALERT_CAT="resource" ;;
    *disk*|*storage*|*iscsi*|*lun*) ALERT_CAT="storage" ;;
    *interface*|*port*|*bgp*|*network*) ALERT_CAT="network" ;;
    *cilium*|*k8s*|*pod*|*node*|*etcd*) ALERT_CAT="kubernetes" ;;
    *cert*|*ssl*|*tls*) ALERT_CAT="certificate" ;;
    *maintenance*|*reboot*|*upgrade*) ALERT_CAT="maintenance" ;;
    *correlated*|*burst*) ALERT_CAT="correlated" ;;
  esac
fi
# Determine resolution_type from feedback signals
RESOLUTION_TYPE='unknown'
FEEDBACK_SCORE=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT CASE 
  WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 'approved'
  WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 'rejected'
  WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'mixed'
  ELSE 'unscored' END FROM session_feedback WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" 2>/dev/null)
[ -n "$FEEDBACK_SCORE" ] && [ "$FEEDBACK_SCORE" != "unscored" ] && RESOLUTION_TYPE="$FEEDBACK_SCORE"
# Get prompt_variant from sessions table
PROMPT_VARIANT=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT prompt_variant FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO session_log (issue_id, issue_title, session_id, started_at, message_count, outcome, cost_usd, num_turns, duration_seconds, confidence, resolution_type, alert_category, prompt_variant, model, schema_version) SELECT issue_id, issue_title, session_id, started_at, message_count, 'done', COALESCE(cost_usd,0), COALESCE(num_turns,0), COALESCE(duration_seconds,0), COALESCE(confidence,-1), '$RESOLUTION_TYPE', '$ALERT_CAT', COALESCE(prompt_variant,''), COALESCE(model,''), 1 FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID'; DELETE FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID'; DELETE FROM queue WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" && /app/claude-gateway/scripts/compute-quality-score.sh '$ISSUE_ID' 2>/dev/null || true && rm -f $GW/$LOCK_FILE
rm -f /tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl /tmp/claude-run-${ISSUE_ID}.jsonl.offset && touch "$GW/gateway.cooldown.$ISSUE_ID" && echo 'Cleaned up'

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '## Session Summary

' + $('Parse Summary').first().json.summary + '

---
*Session closed — state set to To Verify*' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ issues: [{ idReadable: $('Parse Summary').first().json.issueId }], query: 'state To Verify' }) }}

parameters.command:
=DB="/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $('Parse Summary').first().json.issueId || '' }}"
LESSON="{{ ($('Parse Summary').first().json.lesson || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}"
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)

# Store lesson learned (for ALL issue types, not just infra)
sqlite3 $DB "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lessons_learned (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, issue_id TEXT DEFAULT '', lesson TEXT NOT NULL, source TEXT DEFAULT '', created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ll_created ON lessons_learned(created_at);" 2>/dev/null

if [ -n "$LESSON" ]; then
  sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO lessons_learned (issue_id, lesson, source) VALUES ('$ISSUE_ID', '$(echo "$LESSON" | sed "s/'/''/g")', 'claude-code');"
  echo "LESSON:$ISSUE_ID:$LESSON"
fi

if [ "$PREFIX" != "IFRNLLEI01PRD" ] && [ "$PREFIX" != "IFRGRSKG01PRD" ]; then
  # Dev project: store session knowledge + episodic memory
  sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE incident_knowledge ADD COLUMN project TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null || true

  SESSION_DATA=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(confidence,-1), COALESCE(cost_usd,0), COALESCE(duration_seconds,0), COALESCE(session_id,'') FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID' LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null)
  CONFIDENCE=$(echo "$SESSION_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f1)
  COST=$(echo "$SESSION_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f2)
  DURATION=$(echo "$SESSION_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f3)
  SID=$(echo "$SESSION_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f4)

  ISSUE_TITLE=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(issue_title,'') FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
  SUMMARY_TEXT=$(echo '{{ ($("Parse Summary").first().json.summary || "").substring(0, 500).replace(/'/g, "''") }}')

  sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO incident_knowledge (alert_rule, hostname, site, resolution, confidence, duration_seconds, cost_usd, session_id, issue_id, project)
    VALUES ('$(echo "$ISSUE_TITLE" | tr -d "'" | head -c 200)', '', '', '$(echo "$SUMMARY_TEXT" | sed "s/'/''/g")', ${CONFIDENCE:--1}, ${DURATION:-0}, ${COST:-0}, '$SID', '$ISSUE_ID', '$PREFIX');" 2>/dev/null || true

  # Embed for semantic search
  python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/kb-semantic-search.py embed 2>/dev/null || true

  # Write episodic memory for OpenClaw
  sqlite3 $DB "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO openclaw_memory (category, key, value, issue_id)
    VALUES ('dev-session', '${PREFIX}:${ISSUE_ID}', '$(echo "$SUMMARY_TEXT" | head -c 200 | sed "s/'/''/g") (confidence: ${CONFIDENCE:--1})', '$ISSUE_ID');" 2>/dev/null || true

  echo "DEV_KNOWLEDGE:$ISSUE_ID:$PREFIX"
  exit 0
fi

SITE=$([ "$PREFIX" = "IFRGRSKG01PRD" ] && echo "gr" || echo "nl")

sqlite3 $DB "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS incident_knowledge (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  alert_rule TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  hostname TEXT DEFAULT '',
  site TEXT DEFAULT '',
  root_cause TEXT DEFAULT '',
  resolution TEXT DEFAULT '',
  confidence REAL DEFAULT -1,
  duration_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  session_id TEXT DEFAULT '',
  issue_id TEXT DEFAULT '',
  tags TEXT DEFAULT '',
  embedding TEXT DEFAULT ''
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ik_alert ON incident_knowledge(alert_rule);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ik_host ON incident_knowledge(hostname);"

sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE incident_knowledge ADD COLUMN embedding TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null || true

SESSION_DATA=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT COALESCE(confidence,-1), COALESCE(cost_usd,0), COALESCE(duration_seconds,0), COALESCE(session_id,'') FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID' LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null)
CONFIDENCE=$(echo "$SESSION_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f1)
COST=$(echo "$SESSION_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f2)
DURATION=$(echo "$SESSION_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f3)
SID=$(echo "$SESSION_DATA" | cut -d'|' -f4)

YT_FIELDS=$(curl -sf --max-time 10 \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer REDACTED_YT_TOKEN" \
  "https://youtrack.example.net/api/issues/$ISSUE_ID?fields=customFields(name,value(name))" 2>/dev/null)

HOSTNAME=$(echo "$YT_FIELDS" | python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read());[print(str(f.get('value','') if not isinstance(f.get('value'),dict) else f['value'].get('name',''))) for f in d.get('customFields',[]) if f['name']=='Hostname']" 2>/dev/null | head -1)
ALERT_RULE=$(echo "$YT_FIELDS" | python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read());[print(str(f.get('value','') if not isinstance(f.get('value'),dict) else f['value'].get('name',''))) for f in d.get('customFields',[]) if f['name']=='Alert Rule']" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

SUMMARY=$(echo '{{ ($('Parse Summary').first().json.summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}' | head -c 1000)

sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO incident_knowledge (alert_rule, hostname, site, resolution, confidence, duration_seconds, cost_usd, session_id, issue_id) VALUES ('$(echo "$ALERT_RULE" | tr -d "'")','$(echo "$HOSTNAME" | tr -d "'")','$SITE','$(echo "$SUMMARY" | sed "s/'/''/g")',${CONFIDENCE:--1},${DURATION:-0},${COST:-0},'$SID','$ISSUE_ID');"

python3 ~/gitlab/n8n/claude-gateway/scripts/kb-semantic-search.py embed 2>/dev/null || true

echo "KNOWLEDGE:$ISSUE_ID:$HOSTNAME:$ALERT_RULE"

# Log A2A completion event
sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO a2a_task_log (message_id, issue_id, from_tier, from_agent, to_tier, to_agent, message_type, state, payload_summary, confidence)
  VALUES ('completion-$(date +%s)', '$ISSUE_ID', 2, 'claude-code', 0, 'system', 'completion', 'completed',
  '$(echo "$SUMMARY" | head -c 200 | sed "s/'/''/g")', ${CONFIDENCE:--1});" 2>/dev/null || true

# Populate graph (incremental)
cd /app/claude-gateway
python3 scripts/populate-graph.py --issue "$ISSUE_ID" 2>&1 || echo 'graph population skipped'

=cd /app/claude-gateway && python3 scripts/parse-tool-calls.py "/tmp/claude-run-{{ $("Parse Summary").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}.jsonl" --issue "{{ $("Parse Summary").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}" 2>&1 || echo 'tool call parsing skipped'
=cd /app/claude-gateway && python3 scripts/populate-graph.py --issue "{{ $("Parse Summary").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}" 2>&1 || echo 'graph population skipped'

={{ $json.body.sessionId ? "unset CLAUDECODE && /home/app-user/.local/bin/claude -r " + $json.body.sessionId + " --output-format json --dangerously-skip-permissions \"Summarize what you worked on in this session in 2-3 sentences. Then on a new line starting with LESSON: write a single sentence describing what you learned that would help with similar issues in the future (a novel failure mode, an unexpected root cause, a tool that worked well, or a gotcha to avoid). If nothing novel was learned, write LESSON: none.\" 2>&1" : "echo '{\"result\": \"No summary available (no session ID)\"}'}" }}

=DB="/app/cubeos/claude-context/gateway.db"
GW="/app/cubeos/claude-context"
ISSUE_ID="{{ $("Parse Summary").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}"
PREFIX=$(echo "$ISSUE_ID" | cut -d- -f1)
case "$PREFIX" in
  IFRNLLEI01PRD) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.infra-nl" ;;
  IFRGRSKG01PRD) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.infra-gr" ;;
  CUBEOS) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.cubeos" ;;
  MESHSAT) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.meshsat" ;;
  *) LOCK_FILE="gateway.lock.dev" ;;
esac
# Ensure columns exist in both tables
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN num_turns INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN duration_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN confidence REAL DEFAULT -1;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN resolution_type TEXT DEFAULT 'unknown';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN alert_category TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN prompt_variant TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE session_log ADD COLUMN model TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN model TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN cost_usd REAL DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN num_turns INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN duration_seconds INTEGER DEFAULT 0;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN confidence REAL DEFAULT -1;" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN prompt_variant TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
sqlite3 $DB "ALTER TABLE sessions ADD COLUMN alert_category TEXT DEFAULT '';" 2>/dev/null
# Determine alert_category from issue title (fallback if Runner didn't set it)
ISSUE_TITLE_LOWER=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT LOWER(issue_title) FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
ALERT_CAT=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT alert_category FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID' AND alert_category != '';" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
if [ -z "$ALERT_CAT" ]; then
  ALERT_CAT="general"
  case "$ISSUE_TITLE_LOWER" in
    *up/down*|*unreachable*|*ping*|*down*) ALERT_CAT="availability" ;;
    *cpu*|*load*|*memory*|*oom*) ALERT_CAT="resource" ;;
    *disk*|*storage*|*iscsi*|*lun*) ALERT_CAT="storage" ;;
    *interface*|*port*|*bgp*|*network*) ALERT_CAT="network" ;;
    *cilium*|*k8s*|*pod*|*node*|*etcd*) ALERT_CAT="kubernetes" ;;
    *cert*|*ssl*|*tls*) ALERT_CAT="certificate" ;;
    *maintenance*|*reboot*|*upgrade*) ALERT_CAT="maintenance" ;;
    *correlated*|*burst*) ALERT_CAT="correlated" ;;
  esac
fi
# Determine resolution_type from feedback signals
RESOLUTION_TYPE='unknown'
FEEDBACK_SCORE=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT CASE 
  WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 'approved'
  WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN 'rejected'
  WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
    AND SUM(CASE WHEN feedback_type='thumbs_down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'mixed'
  ELSE 'unscored' END FROM session_feedback WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" 2>/dev/null)
[ -n "$FEEDBACK_SCORE" ] && [ "$FEEDBACK_SCORE" != "unscored" ] && RESOLUTION_TYPE="$FEEDBACK_SCORE"
# Get prompt_variant from sessions table
PROMPT_VARIANT=$(sqlite3 $DB "SELECT prompt_variant FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO session_log (issue_id, issue_title, session_id, started_at, message_count, outcome, cost_usd, num_turns, duration_seconds, confidence, resolution_type, alert_category, prompt_variant, model, schema_version) SELECT issue_id, issue_title, session_id, started_at, message_count, 'done', COALESCE(cost_usd,0), COALESCE(num_turns,0), COALESCE(duration_seconds,0), COALESCE(confidence,-1), '$RESOLUTION_TYPE', '$ALERT_CAT', COALESCE(prompt_variant,''), COALESCE(model,''), 1 FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID'; DELETE FROM sessions WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID'; DELETE FROM queue WHERE issue_id='$ISSUE_ID';" && /app/claude-gateway/scripts/compute-quality-score.sh '$ISSUE_ID' 2>/dev/null || true && rm -f $GW/$LOCK_FILE

ALERT_RULE=$(echo "$YT_FIELDS" | python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read());[print(str(f.get('value','') if not isinstance(f.get('value'),dict) else f['value'].get('name',''))) for f in d.get('customFields',[]) if f['name']=='Alert Rule']" 2>/dev/null | head -1)

echo "KNOWLEDGE:$ISSUE_ID:$HOSTNAME:$ALERT_RULE"

# Log A2A completion event
sqlite3 $DB "INSERT INTO a2a_task_log (message_id, issue_id, from_tier, from_agent, to_tier, to_agent, message_type, state, payload_summary, confidence)
  VALUES ('completion-$(date +%s)', '$ISSUE_ID', 2, 'claude-code', 0, 'system', 'completion', 'completed',
  '$(echo "$SUMMARY" | head -c 200 | sed "s/'/''/g")', ${CONFIDENCE:--1});" 2>/dev/null || true

# Populate graph (incremental)
cd /app/claude-gateway
python3 scripts/populate-graph.py --issue "$ISSUE_ID" 2>&1 || echo 'graph population skipped'

=cd /app/claude-gateway && python3 scripts/parse-tool-calls.py "/tmp/claude-run-{{ $("Parse Summary").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}.jsonl" --issue "{{ $("Parse Summary").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}" 2>&1 || echo 'tool call parsing skipped'
=cd /app/claude-gateway && python3 scripts/populate-graph.py --issue "{{ $("Parse Summary").first().json.issueId || 'unknown' }}" 2>&1 || echo 'graph population skipped'
